\begin{figure}[t]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=\linewidth]{figures/transcription_accuracy_hr/stt_transcription_accuracy.pdf}
\caption{Mean transcription accuracy on key entities per cascade STT model,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
  pooled across the three \framework~domains. Each bar is the mean of per-scenario                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  accuracies (one value per scenario, averaged over $k{=}5$ trials);                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  whiskers are 95\% normal-approximation CIs on that mean. Models are sorted                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
  ascending. \novafull~aggregates the two cascades that share it                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
  (\novafull~+ \gptfull~+ \sonicfull~and \novafull~+ \gptminifull~+ \aurafull),                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
  giving it twice as many scenario observations and a correspondingly tighter                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
  interval. \scribefull~saturates near $1.0$ on this benchmark; the gap to                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
  the next-best STT (\parakeetfull) exceeds $0.19$.}
\label{fig:stt_transcription_accuracy}
\end{figure}
